data.body:
[Total Assault Preview]

Total Assault - Chesed (Field Warfare) will be held on 12/14 (Tue)!
It's time for the Piercing Attribute students!

Check out the strategies of other Sensei's in the official Discord as well.
(The post has been reuploaded due to image updates.)
